All I Ching FAQ
Hexagrams & Changing Lines

What is a relating hexagram?

A relating hexagram is the pattern formed when changing lines transform into their opposite line type.

DirectoryWhat it addsHow to avoid overreading

What it adds

It gives the reading a second layer: not just the current pattern, but the direction or pressure implied by change.

How to avoid overreading

Use it as supporting context, not as a second unrelated answer.
